prompt: Create a cinematic close-up portrait of a rugged adult man in a dramatic semi-realistic Western anime / AAA game concept-art style. He is shown from the chest up in a three-quarter view facing right, with a stern, focused expression, thick angular eyebrows, piercing green eyes, a strong nose, sharp cheekbones, and a full neatly shaped dark beard. His dark brown hair is short on the sides and swept upward into textured spiky layers. He wears a plain black crew-neck T-shirt and a thin silver chain necklace with a small cross pendant. The lighting is moody and cinematic: cool blue rim light from the left edge, warm amber light from the right, strong painterly shadows across the face and neck, high contrast but not photorealistic. The background is a blurred nighttime urban alley or industrial street interior with blue and orange bokeh, indistinct windows, pipes, and architectural shapes, keeping all attention on the character. Use sharp stylized facial planes, confident brush strokes, clean edges on the face, painterly texture in the clothing and background, shallow depth of field, widescreen composition, no text, no watermark, no extra characters.
promptEn: Create a cinematic close-up portrait of a rugged adult man in a dramatic semi-realistic Western anime / AAA game concept-art style. He is shown from the chest up in a three-quarter view facing right, with a stern, focused expression, thick angular eyebrows, piercing green eyes, a strong nose, sharp cheekbones, and a full neatly shaped dark beard. His dark brown hair is short on the sides and swept upward into textured spiky layers. He wears a plain black crew-neck T-shirt and a thin silver chain necklace with a small cross pendant. The lighting is moody and cinematic: cool blue rim light from the left edge, warm amber light from the right, strong painterly shadows across the face and neck, high contrast but not photorealistic. The background is a blurred nighttime urban alley or industrial street interior with blue and orange bokeh, indistinct windows, pipes, and architectural shapes, keeping all attention on the character. Use sharp stylized facial planes, confident brush strokes, clean edges on the face, painterly texture in the clothing and background, shallow depth of field, widescreen composition, no text, no watermark, no extra characters.
promptZh: 创作一张电影感特写肖像，主角为 一位粗犷的成年男子，采用戏剧性的半写实西方动画 / 3A 游戏概念艺术风格。画面呈现胸部以上的四分之三侧面视角，主角面向右侧，表情严肃专注，拥有浓密的棱角分明的眉毛、锐利的 绿色 双眼、挺拔的鼻梁、轮廓分明的颧骨，以及修剪整齐的浓密深色胡须。他的 深褐色 头发两侧较短，顶部向上梳理成富有质感的尖刺层次。他身穿一件简约的黑色圆领 T 恤，佩戴一条带有小型十字架吊坠的细银链。灯光效果充满电影感与情绪氛围：左侧边缘带有冷蓝色轮廓光，右侧带有暖琥珀色光，面部和颈部有强烈的绘画感阴影，对比度高但非写实照片风格。背景为模糊的夜间城市小巷或工业街道内景，带有蓝色和橙色的光斑（bokeh），以及模糊的窗户、管道和建筑轮廓，确保视觉焦点完全集中在角色身上。运用锐利的风格化面部结构、自信的笔触、清晰的面部边缘、衣物与背景的绘画质感、浅景深、宽银幕构图，无文字，无水印，无额外角色。
